# [Clang] Assertion `isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"` failed.

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/174987

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang assertions trunk crashed but trunk is fine.
Goes back to 6.0.1.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/16vKGc5cb

## Program
```cpp
#include <iostream>
template <int &T> void FuncTemplate() {
  std::cout << T << std::endl;
}


enum { E = 0, F = 1 };
template <int N, int M = ((N == 1) ? F : E)> class S {};
template <int N> struct T {
  static void foo(S<N> *p) {
    S<N> u;
    [&u]() -> bool {
      static int InternalVar;
      FuncTemplate<InternalVar>();
    }();
  }
};

int main() { T<0>().foo(0); }
```

PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.

## Program
```cpp
#include &lt;iostream&gt;
template &lt;int &amp;T&gt; void FuncTemplate() {
  std::cout &lt;&lt; T &lt;&lt; std::endl;
}


enum { E = 0, F = 1 };
template &lt;int N, int M = ((N == 1) ? F : E)&gt; class S {};
template &lt;int N&gt; struct T {
  static void foo(S&lt;N&gt; *p) {
    S&lt;N&gt; u;
    [&amp;u]() -&gt; bool {
      static int InternalVar;
      FuncTemplate&lt;InternalVar&gt;();
    }();
  }
};

int main() { T&lt;0&gt;().foo(0); }
```
